metadata.description: Financial market analysis skills powered by Alpha Vantage — equities, macro economics, forex, and crypto.

plugins.name: alpha-equities
plugins.description: Stock prices, company fundamentals, 40+ technical indicators, and market news/sentiment via Alpha Vantage

plugins.name: alpha-macro
plugins.description: US economic indicators (GDP, CPI, Fed rate), commodity prices (oil, gold, agriculture), and market movers via Alpha Vantage

plugins.name: alpha-fx-crypto
plugins.description: Forex currency pairs and cryptocurrency prices/trends via Alpha Vantage
